_meta.stability: Frozen for the loom-generation lifetime per ADR-002. Shape additions that preserve wire compatibility (new optional response fields) are allowed; breaking changes require a new generation.
_meta.relation_to_classic: Classic CommentRecord uses id (the comment's primary key); loom CommentRecordLoom uses comment_id (entity-typed primary key). Status 201 matches classic.

shape_decl.rationale: comment_id replaces classic CommentRecord.id following the same entity-primary-key rename pattern as SlimIssue → SlimIssueLoom.
